entity.name: Jean-Marc Nahlovsky
entity.description: Maintainer of asiai — Apple Silicon LLM inference benchmark and monitoring CLI.

projects.name: asiai
projects.description: Multi-engine LLM benchmark and monitoring CLI for Apple Silicon Macs (M1–M5). Auto-detects 8 inference engines, runs reproducible benchmarks, exposes an MCP server with 11 tools, publishes a community leaderboard.

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors — recurring or one-time support for the maintainer.

plans.name: Any-amount one-time support
plans.description: Pay-what-you-want one-time donation via GitHub Sponsors. Helps cover hardware costs (Mac M-series test devices) and time spent on benchmarks/community DB.

plans.name: Monthly recurring support
plans.description: Recurring monthly support via GitHub Sponsors. Direct sustain of asiai maintenance, new engine integrations, and the community leaderboard backend.
